titleStmt.title: SII 17.138: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 138. (A.R. No. 118 of 1904.) TĪRTHANAGARI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the central shrine in the Śivāṅkurēśvara temple.
The epithet, “Maduraiyum Īḻamum Pāṇḍiyaṉ muḍittalaiyuṅgoṇḍaruḷiya” of Kulōttuṅga III is given in this inscription.

It records the gift of land as tirunundāviḷakkuppuṟam (land granted for burning a perpetual lamp) to the god at Tiruttiṉainagar in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu by Kuḍandai Uḍaiyāṉ Tiṉaiyaṉ Nāyaṉ of Pāñchavaṉmādēvipuram.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭa ruḷiya [śrī] kulot
tuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupattoṉṟāvatu Irā[ja*]rā[ja*]vaḷanāṭṭu mutalāṉa ceyaṅ koṇṭacoḻaccaruppetimaṅka
lattu Uṭaiyār tiruttaṉainakaruṭaiyāṟku tirunuṉtāviḷakkuppuṟamāka pañcavaṉmātevi parattu kuṭantai Uṭaiyāṉ tiṉaiyaṉ
nāyaṉ Innāyanāṟkuk koṇṭuviṭṭa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻac caturvetimaṅkaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.138 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
